name: Imperial Brands PLC
description: Imperial Brands PLC is a multinational tobacco company headquartered in Bristol, England. It is the world's fourth-largest international cigarette company measured by market share. The company manufactures and sells cigarettes, fine-cut tobacco, tobacco papers, cigars, and next-generation products such as e-cigarettes, heated tobacco, and oral nicotine. Its portfolio includes well-known brands such as Davidoff, Gauloises, JPS, West, and Winston.
